rule_text: OBLIGATIONS of CONTRACTOR: undertake SURVEY, INVESTIGATION, DESIGN, ENGINEERING, PROCUREMENT and CONSTRUCTION of the Project Works. COMPLY with ALL APPLICABLE LAWS and APPLICABLE PERMITS (including renewals). DISCHARGE obligations per GOOD INDUSTRY PRACTICE and as a REASONABLE and PRUDENT PERSON. ASSUME FULL RESPONSIBILITY for proper and timely execution of works to MEET the TIME FOR COMPLETION. REMEDY any LOSS or DAMAGE to Project Works from APPOINTED DATE until the END of CONSTRUCTION PERIOD at the Contractor's cost.
verification_method: PASS if §3.1 verbatim in GCC. FAIL on watered-down obligations.

rule_text: SUB-CONTRACTING LIMIT: The Contractor SHALL NOT SUB-CONTRACT any Works in MORE THAN {{max_subcontract_pct}}% (default 50%) of the contract price AND SHALL CARRY OUT works DIRECTLY under its OWN supervision and through its OWN PERSONNEL in AT LEAST {{min_direct_pct}}% (default 50%) of the contract price.
verification_method: PASS if SCC enforces ≤50% subcontracting + ≥50% direct execution. FAIL on excessive subcontracting allowance.

rule_text: Where ANY SUB-CONTRACT for Works (or AGGREGATE of sub-contracts with any Sub-Contractor) EXCEEDS {{subcontract_disclose_pct}}% (default 5%) of the Contract Price, the Contractor SHALL DISCLOSE the SUB-CONTRACTOR's identity to the Authority.
verification_method: PASS if disclosure mechanism + threshold included in SCC. FAIL on absent disclosure obligation.

rule_text: EMPLOYMENT of FOREIGN PERSONNEL by the Contractor and/or Sub-contractors SHALL be SUBJECT to grant of REQUISITE REGULATORY PERMITS and APPROVALS (employment/residential visas and work permits). The OBLIGATION to APPLY for and OBTAIN the same SHALL be of the CONTRACTOR. REFUSAL or INABILITY to obtain such permits SHALL NOT CONSTITUTE FORCE MAJEURE and SHALL NOT EXCUSE the Contractor from performance.
verification_method: PASS if visa/permit responsibility on contractor + non-FM exclusion explicit. FAIL on contractor passing risk to Authority.

rule_text: CONTRACTOR's PERSONNEL: the Contractor SHALL ENSURE personnel are APPROPRIATELY QUALIFIED, SKILLED and EXPERIENCED per Good Industry Practice. The Contractor SHALL GIVE PREFERENCE to LOCAL VILLAGERS for UNSKILLED LABOUR REQUIREMENT and PROVIDE a QUARTERLY REPORT to the Authority Engineer on PERSON-DAYS of EMPLOYMENT provided to local villagers (FOR BOTH MEN AND WOMEN SEPARATELY).
verification_method: PASS if SCC mandates local-villager preference + gender-disaggregated quarterly reporting. FAIL on absent local-employment clause.

rule_text: The AUTHORITY's REPRESENTATIVE MAY, for REASONS to be SPECIFIED IN WRITING, DIRECT the Contractor to REMOVE any member of the Contractor's or Sub-contractor's personnel. On receiving such direction, the Contractor SHALL ORDER REMOVAL of the named person.
verification_method: PASS if Authority's removal-power clause is unambiguous and reasoned. FAIL on missing removal-rights clause.
